feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Weight of Never Leaving
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,608Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Jason Todd has been dead for six hours and is already at the garden wall. Martha Wayne runs the perimeter. Thomas holds the suppression. The new ghost doesn't wait for orientation — he has three years of field intelligence and a shit list and unfinished business with every name on it. Above them, Bruce Wayne in the cave listening to Morrow's anniversary digging for the first time with his eyes open. Clark Kent in the city, within reach, for now. Alfred Pennyworth with medication on the nightstand and a very specific idea of where he wants to die. The Weight of Never Leaving is the third book of The House We Never Leave. It is the one where the fracture completes, the talon surfaces, a fourteen-year-old with a surveillance file and no survival instincts rings the doorbell at dusk, and Alfred Pennyworth dies in his chosen place. Clark was right. Bruce chooses the house anyway. He stands at the window. He does not run after him. Every heartbeat hurts.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Bat Princess and Cybertronian Bumblebee
entry.summary:
Author: NatalyaAglaevnaNaryshkina

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,822Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 2

Summary: [Transformers + DC, Crossover, Pairing: Bumblebee, Human/Transformer, Minor All Characters/OC, Heavy Headcanons]As the only daughter of a certain Dark Knight, the little princess of Gotham, Nova could get almost anything she wanted with ease. Money? Is there any entity richer than Wayne Enterprises? Strength? Come on, her father is Batman! For Miss Nova, there was no problem that money couldn't solve. If there was, it just meant she hadn't spent enough money—and she had more than enough of that. That was, until she bought a pair of broken glasses to help a classmate with his car-buying plan. Everything changed completely after that.Bumblebee's mission was to protect the holder of the glasses until his leader arrived on Earth. While he was waiting in the used car lot to be bought by Sam, that human girl named Nova smiled at him. From that moment on, that smile became a mark he could never erase from his processor.Nova had once asked him: "Bumblebee, do you like me?" Bumblebee did not answer, only feeling his spark beating abnormally fast. By the time he finally understood his own feelings, it was already too late. "I once had a star. Before she went out."

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Reporters Way
entry.summary:
Author: CowgirlJ23

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,748Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: A year after the leaked video of Superman's parents, all he wants to do is keep anything negative relating to Superman out of the press. But what about Clark Kent? After being invited to cover a charity gala for Bruce Wayne, his entanglement with him grows more and more each day. But the more that he learns about Bruce, the more that he feels that this is something hidden behind the mask of the playboy billionaire that he puts on, and Clark is determined to find out what it is. And as reported, Clark Kents always gets his way.

entry.title: It’s brutal out here!
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,396Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 110

Summary: When Bruce’s silence gestured for him to go on, Clark chuckled slightly, fiddling with the sleeve of his shirt. “You know what I mean. Everyone had a grungy era of their childhood. Mine was just a little more . . . intense than others. I was more rebellious than troublesome, honestly.” Or Clark gets de-aged to seventeen a.k.a when he had his punk rock phase, and everyone is forced to bare witness

entry.title: It's All Washing Over Me (I'm Angry Again)
entry.summary:
Author: crieslikeafool

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,166Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 25

Summary: He is trying to think about ways to make himself disappear as stealthy as he can when someone sits right next to him. He doesn’t remember crossing his arms on the wooden countertop and smushing his face between them, but he knows it’s not Alfred next to him.Dark blue slacks of opaque polyester, gray trainers, a leather messenger bag. It takes him way more than usual to connect the dots, but the second he does he snaps his head up, trying not to fall from his seat. “Oh, I’m sorry, didn’t mean to scare you.” Clark. ---or, 3+1, three Times Clark break Bruce's heart without knowing, and one time he doesn't.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Simplest Words Make The Most Complicated Sentences
entry.summary:
Author: LuKuXing

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,120Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 71

Summary: In a world where your soulmate's first words were written on your body, Bruce couldn't think of anything other than how much he appreciated his soulmate, even if they weren't here. Soulmates were supposed to love you for who you were in your core. Would Bruce's soulmate love him as he is? Would they cherish him? Put up with him? Nevertheless, he was excited to meet his soulmate.

entry.title: I Love You, I Hate You
entry.summary:
Author: Nigaki

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,952Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 451

Summary: Bruce is helplessly in love with Superman. How can he not? The man is practically perfect in every way, and being around him just makes Bruce feel good. Which is not something that happens often. He's perfectly happy being just Superman's friend until he starts to notice a certain reporter gets suspiciously close to Superman. Getting jealous, he decides to fight for Superman's love. How hard could it be? Clark Kent is no match for Batman.

entry.title: Wayne Chronicles
entry.summary:
Author: Batsy_bat_YAW

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,837Chapters: 5/50Kudos: 6

Summary: A lot happens in the Batfamily, from family meetings to family fun, all the way to dangerous situations...They have been through a lot, but they stick together through it all. So I present to you a slice of life in all its aspects, from the bloody, painful days, the dramatic days, to the fluffy family days. I am proud to present Wayne Chronicles, from the Batboys, Daddy Bats, Agent A, and me. A flowing story where each pretty long 'oneshot' connects like episodes in a TV series. Enjoy! *A LOT of Jason and Bruce having a healthy relationship (guys, I need this), family bonding, Tim coffee addiction, a bit of Jason angst, a lot of injuries, and a few kidnappings, BRUCE BEING A GOOD DAD, The JLA are FRIENDS FOR ONCE, so Beware!* !WARNING! Regular updates (most of the time), there will be periods of silence cuz i will be working on a lot of storylines at once for this, blood, some gore (note the sarcasm), stories that will play with your emotional spectrum, and finally cliffhangers! Also, this was written over the years, so my writing will improve from chapter to chapter.

entry.title: How to Lose Your Virginity (And Accidentally Fall in Love)
entry.summary:
Author: breathbetween

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,442Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 353

Summary: Bruce let out a deep, tired sigh and rubbed at his temple with his glove. “Speak,” he grunted. “You- you mean that-” Clark took a sharp breath, his voice coming out thin, like air slipping from a deflating balloon. “You’re also a virgin?!” Bruce regretted engaging in this conversation instantly. It could have been such a peaceful night.  or whereBatman doesn’t do relationships. Superman is afraid he might hurt someone if he tries. So they come up with a solution. Because what could possibly go wrong with losing your virginity to your best friend? Right?

entry.title: My neighbor the Kryptonian (not clickbait)
entry.summary:
Author: El_kun

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,856Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 113

Summary: Peter Parker's new upstairs neighbor is too nice, too tall, and keeps leaving first-aid kits by his door like he knows something. Clark Kent's downstairs neighbor is too skinny, too tired, and keeps coming home bleeding through his hoodie like he thinks no one notices. It takes a collapsed ceiling, a concrete beam, and one very awkward conversation for them to realize they're both dorks and nerds.

entry.title: Temptation is One Hell of a Thing
entry.summary:
Author: acatcam

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,676Chapters: 30/?Kudos: 325

Summary: Bruce Wayne never expected to walk into a church again - let alone with his four-year-old son in his arms. But when a meeting with Clark Kent, a priest. It turns into more than polite conversation, Bruce finds himself disarmed by a man who shouldn’t have surprised him at all. Clark is broad-shouldered, and impossibly kind; a believer in things Bruce turned his back on the day of his parents’ funeral. Bruce is skeptical, Clark is steadfast. Their ideologies clash from the moment they sit across from one another: billionaire pragmatism versus the faith of a priest. But somewhere between coloring books at Clark’s desk and quiet invitations to community fairs, a dangerous warmth grows. Bruce doesn’t know how to name it, and Clark doesn’t dare. Because whatever is happening between them - it shouldn’t. Bruce pushes, searching for the language he can’t bring himself to say aloud, while Clark whispers what he shouldn’t confess at all: I can’t. A vow binds him to the Church, but his heart betrays him in every secret meeting, every glance held too long. It shouldn’t work. It can’t work. But it does. And as much Clark Kent prays, temptation seeps through.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: under pressure
entry.summary:
Author: tazatouille

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,150Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 80

Summary: “This is very childish,” Bruce says, looking up at him despairingly. “Even for you.” “I’m gonna ignore that last part,” Clark tells him, leaning down. He can feel the rise and fall of Bruce’s chest underneath him. Admittedly, if Bruce tried hard enough he could probably push Clark off of him, but he didn’t seem annoyed enough yet to make an attempt. Though, Bruce would never admit that the way his eyebrows are knit right now. That and… Clark is currently using some super strength to keep him where he wants him. “I told you to stay.” “So your solution was to sit on top of me?” Bruce hits Clark’s thigh, which he barely feels. He huffs and drops his head back onto the pillow. “You know, there are more fun situations we could be in at the moment.” --- Clark wants to know the truth.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent
  • Bruce Wayne
